title: Quantbot user input protection: WM_SETFOCUS focus-steal guard
desc: auto_dismiss_hts_popups.py steals keyboard/mouse focus every 1-5s via WM_SETFOCUS (lines 454,534,677). Focusless replacement: WM_SETTEXT + EN_CHANGE instead of WM_SETFOCUS + WM_CHAR. Covers diagnosis, fix pattern, and trigger file cleanup.
steps: PROBLEM: win32gui.SendMessage(hwnd, WM_SETFOCUS, 0, 0) transfers system input focus to target control. Any loop with this call disrupts user typing/cursor position.

DETECTION: auto_dismiss_hts_popups.py -- line 454 _enter_pin_if_needed, line 534 _enter_stock_code_if_needed (1s loop while C:/temp/hts_stock_code.txt exists), line 677 _enter_qty_if_needed (1s loop while C:/temp/hts_stock_qty.txt exists).
FOCUSLESS TEXT INPUT PATTERN: win32gui.SendMessage(edit_hwnd, win32con.WM_SETTEXT, 0, text) sets text; then win32gui.SendMessage(parent_hwnd, win32con.WM_COMMAND, (win32con.EN_CHANGE<<16)
ctrl_id, edit_hwnd) notifies parent. No WM_SETFOCUS needed.

FOCUSLESS CHAR-BY-CHAR PATTERN (MFC masked fields): for ch in text: win32api.SendMessage(edit_hwnd, win32con.WM_CHAR, ord(ch), 0). MFC CMaskedEdit accepts WM_CHAR without focus -- remove the preceding WM_SETFOCUS call.
FIX LINE 454 PIN: Remove SendMessage(eh, WM_SETFOCUS,..) before the WM_CHAR loop. WM_CHAR delivers to target without focus transfer.
FIX LINE 534 STOCK CODE: Replace WM_SETFOCUS + WM_CHAR sequence with WM_SETTEXT(code_edit, stock_code) + WM_COMMAND EN_CHANGE to parent.
FIX LINE 677 QTY: Same -- WM_SETTEXT(target_edit, qty_str) + WM_COMMAND EN_CHANGE. Remove WM_SETFOCUS entirely.
TRIGGER FILE CLEANUP: hts_stock_code.txt and hts_stock_qty.txt must be deleted after order completion. Persistent files cause 1-second loop to fire indefinitely.
VERIFY focusless: run foreground monitor while script active -- foreground window must not change during automation steps.
author: claude
